{{ intro ?? 'Use this page as a readable base for documentation, blog posts or marketing content.' }}
Shaka is built to be understandable for beginners. Templates keep their default values, CSS stays close to each component and the markup remains easy to read.
• One component, one Twig file, one CSS file.
{% include 'shaka/components/_alert.html.twig' with { variant: 'info', title: 'Tip', text: 'This page is here to show the default typography and content rhythm.' } only %}

{% include 'shaka/components/_card.html.twig' with { title: 'Reusable content block', text: 'Cards are intentionally simple and can be reused in articles, dashboards or landing pages.', href: '#' } only %}
